title: Geyser Guy Plumbers: your trusted local plumbing experts
description: BUSINESS NEWS - Geyser Guy Plumbers brings...
bodyText:
Advertorial

BUSINESS NEWS - Geyser Guy Plumbers brings more than 26 years of experience in the local plumbing industry to your doorstep.


> Their excellent reputation has gained them the trust of accredited insurance companies, serving as a testament to their service and expertise.


Their team of professional plumbers are qualified and experienced, capable of handling everything including:

- Maintenance plumbing
- Electrical geyser installations
- Unblocking drains, and many more

The company is proud to be registered with the Institute of Plumbing South Africa (IOPSA) as well as the Plumbing Industry Registration Board (PIRB), ensuring that their services meet the highest industry standards. "We are constantly engaged in ongoing development and training to expand our service offerings," said owner Chantelle Nienaber-Kruyshaar.

Geyser Guy Plumbers handles claims efficiently, ensuring a smooth and hassle-free process. In addition, they offer special discounts for pensioners, demonstrating their commitment to serving everyone in our community.

"We understand that plumbing issues can be stressful, and we are committed to providing professional, reliable service every time. Trust Geyser Guy Plumbers."

Contact them today to experience unparalleled service and expertise.

"Finally, we want to express our gratitude to all our loyal customers, insurance brokers and fellow businesses that make use of our services, and we look forward to welcoming new customers to our plumbing family."

Visit them at 39 Market Street, or contact them on 044 884 1336. Alternatively, send an email to [email protected], or visit their Facebook page.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
